Back to website Python lab Docs index

Stan Builtins.Py

Clean code reading view for studying, copying, and comparing your own implementation.

emergency-path/.venv/Lib/site-packages/pygments/lexers/_stan_builtins.py

Runs the exact Python code shown below. Output is saved in this browser.


    

    
    
    

      
"""
    pygments.lexers._stan_builtins
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    This file contains the names of functions for Stan used by
    ``pygments.lexers.math.StanLexer. This is for Stan language version 2.36.0.

    :copyright: Copyright 2006-present by the Pygments team, see AUTHORS.
    :license: BSD, see LICENSE for details.
"""

KEYWORDS = (
    'break',
    'continue',
    'else',
    'for',
    'if',
    'in',
    'print',
    'reject',
    'return',
    'while',
    'fatal_error',
    'target'
)

TYPES = (
    'cholesky_factor_corr',
    'cholesky_factor_cov',
    'corr_matrix',
    'cov_matrix',
    'int',
    'matrix',
    'ordered',
    'positive_ordered',
    'real',
    'row_vector',
    'simplex',
    'unit_vector',
    'vector',
    'void',
    'array',
    'complex',
    'complex_vector',
    'complex_matrix',
    'complex_row_vector',
    'corr_matrix',
    'cholesky_factor_corr',
    'column_stochastic_matrix',
    'row_stochastic_matrix',
    'sum_to_zero_vector',
    'sum_to_zero_matrix'
)

RESERVED = (
    'repeat',
    'until',
    'then',
    'true',
    'false',
    'var',
    'struct',
    'typedef',
    'export',
    'auto',

)


      
On this page
No headings found.
